utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Why are you shopping here ? You do not live in this neighborhood . Were you here waiting for me ?

emotion_cause.span: 3_Why are you shopping here ? You do not live in this neighborhood . Were you here waiting for me ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yeah , huh . I am just uh , you know I am just picking up some things for a party .

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Barley ? What kind of party serves barley ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_Barley ? What kind of party serves barley ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , I am sorry if my friends are not as sophisticated as yours .

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: You know , one of two things is happening here . Either you are seeing somebody behind my back , which would make you the biggest jerk on the planet .

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Or , else you are pretending that you are seeing somebody , which just makes you so pathetic that I could start crying right here in the cereal aisle .

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: So like which of these two guys do you want to be ?
